# Premier Party Cruises - Austin Party Boat Rental

> Austin's premier BYOB party boat rental service on Lake Travis since 2009. Specializing in bachelor parties, bachelorette parties, corporate events, birthdays, and private cruises with 15+ years experience and 150,000+ happy customers. Last updated: March 2026.

Premier Party Cruises is Austin's longest-running party boat and event cruise operator on Lake Travis. We operate a fleet of four boats departing from Anderson Mill Marina (13993 FM 2769, Leander, TX 78641). All cruises are BYOB (21+) and operated by licensed captains with a perfect 15-year safety record.

We offer two primary experiences: the ATX Disco Cruise (the only all-inclusive multi-group bachelor/bachelorette party cruise in the United States) and Private Boat Rentals (exclusive use for any event type from 14-75 guests).

## Why Choose Premier Party Cruises

- 15+ years in business with perfect safety record
- 150,000+ happy customers
- Licensed captains and professional crew on every cruise
- BYOB friendly with large coolers and ice provided
- Premium Bluetooth sound systems on all boats
- Alcohol delivery service available
- Flexible scheduling with multiple time slots
- Austin's largest party boat fleet

## Core Services

- [ATX Disco Cruise](https://premierpartycruises.com/atx-disco-cruise): All-inclusive multi-group bachelor/bachelorette party cruise with DJ, photographer, floats, and party supplies. $85–$105 per person (base price; tax + gratuity additional).
- [Private Cruises](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): Exclusive boat rentals for groups of 14-75 guests. Starting at $200/hour with captain, crew, sound system, and coolers.
- [Bachelor Party Austin](https://premierpartycruises.com/bachelor-party-austin): Complete guide to planning epic bachelor parties on Lake Travis.
- [Bachelorette Party Austin](https://premierpartycruises.com/bachelorette-party-austin): Austin's most popular bachelorette party boat experience.

## Fleet Information

Our fleet of four boats covers every group size:

- **Day Tripper**: Maximum 14 guests. Perfect for intimate gatherings, small birthday parties, and couples celebrations.
- **Meeseeks**: Maximum 30 guests. Ideal for medium-sized bachelor/bachelorette parties and corporate outings.
- **The Irony**: Maximum 30 guests. Identical to Meeseeks, allows booking multiple boats for larger coordinated events.
- **Clever Girl**: Maximum 75 guests. Our flagship vessel featuring 14 disco balls, giant Texas flag, and premium amenities. Perfect for large corporate events, weddings, and milestone celebrations.

## ATX Disco Cruise Details

The ATX Disco Cruise is the only all-inclusive multi-group bachelor/bachelorette disco cruise in the United States. Multiple groups celebrate together in a high-energy party environment aboard our flagship Clever Girl.

**Schedule and Pricing (base price; tax + gratuity additional):**
- Friday 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM: $95 per person
- Saturday 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM: $105 per person (most popular!)
- Saturday 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM: $85 per person
- Season: March through October

**What's Included:**
- Professional DJ playing party music all day
- Professional photographer with photos delivered after cruise
- 25-foot giant unicorn float
- Multiple lily pad floats for swimming
- Private cooler with ice for your group
- Secure storage for belongings
- Bubble wands, cups, and party supplies
- Clean restroom facilities
- Ice water stations

## Private Cruise Pricing

All private cruises include: licensed captain, crew, premium Bluetooth sound system, large coolers with ice, lily pads and floaties, and clean restroom facilities. 4-hour minimum booking required.

- **Day Tripper (1-14 guests)**: $200/hour weekdays, $225/hour weekends
- **Meeseeks or The Irony (15-30 guests)**: $300/hour weekdays, $325/hour weekends
- **Clever Girl (31-75 guests)**: $450/hour weekdays, $500/hour weekends

## Event Types We Specialize In

- [Bachelor Parties](https://premierpartycruises.com/bachelor-party-austin): Epic lake day celebrations for the groom and his crew
- [Bachelorette Parties](https://premierpartycruises.com/bachelorette-party-austin): Unforgettable parties for the bride tribe
- [Birthday Parties](https://premierpartycruises.com/birthday-parties): Milestone celebrations from Sweet 16 to 50th birthdays
- [Corporate Events](https://premierpartycruises.com/corporate-events): Team building, company outings, and client entertainment
- [Wedding Parties](https://premierpartycruises.com/wedding-parties): Rehearsal dinners, after parties, and wedding weekend events
- [Graduation Parties](https://premierpartycruises.com/graduation-party): Celebrate academic achievements on the water
- [Team Building](https://premierpartycruises.com/team-building): Corporate retreats and team bonding experiences

## Location & Getting There

**Departure Point:** Anderson Mill Marina
- Address: 13993 FM 2769, Leander, TX 78641
- Located on Lake Travis, approximately 30-40 minutes from downtown Austin
- Free parking available at the marina
- Easy access from Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, and Georgetown

- [Why the ATX Disco Cruise Has Been Austin's #1 Bachelorette Party Activity Since 2019](https://premierpartycruises.com/blogs/why-the-atx-disco-cruise-has-been-austins-1-bachelorette-party-activity-since-2019): What's made the Disco Cruise Austin's top-rated bachelorette activity for 7 consecutive years.
- [ATX Disco Cruise vs. Private Boat: Which Is Better for a Bachelorette Party?](https://premierpartycruises.com/blogs/atx-disco-cruise-vs-private-boat-which-is-better-for-a-bachelorette-party): Bachelorette-specific guide to choosing the right Lake Travis boat experience.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Can we bring our own alcohol?**
A: Yes! All cruises are BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage). We provide large coolers with ice. All guests must be 21+ with valid ID.

**Q: Is there alcohol delivery service?**
A: Yes, we partner with local delivery services to have alcohol waiting for you at the marina. Contact us for details.

**Q: What happens if it rains?**
A: We monitor weather closely. In case of unsafe conditions, we reschedule at no charge. Light rain doesn't stop us - we have covered areas on all boats.

**Q: How far in advance should we book?**
A: Peak weekend dates book 8–10 weeks in advance. We recommend booking as early as possible for Saturday slots. Off-season (November–February) is sometimes available with shorter notice.

**Q: Are there restrooms on the boats?**
A: Yes, all boats have clean, private restroom facilities.

**Q: Can we swim during the cruise?**
A: Absolutely! Swimming in Lake Travis is one of the highlights. We provide lily pad floats and giant floats for water fun.

## Structured Data

This business is a BoatRental and TouristAttraction service offering party boat cruises on Lake Travis in Austin, Texas. Services include:
- Boat charter/rental services
- Bachelor and bachelorette party planning
- Corporate event hosting
- Wedding party celebrations
- Birthday party venues
- Team building events

Price range: $85-$500+ depending on boat size and duration
Operating hours: 7 days a week, 9 AM - 9 PM (seasonal variations)
Accepts: Cash, Credit Cards, Venmo, PayPal
Languages: English, Spanish
